meaning: adj.[化] 无电抗性的,不反应的
examples: Place fillets in a shallow, nonreactive container.
The fluid used with either method may be gas or any nonreactive liquid.
For example, gold is nonreactive but at the nanoscale it becomes a catalyst for reactions.
Place in a nonreactive container (glass or stainless steel) and let stand on the counter overnight.
Transfer the mixture to an 11- or 12-quart copper preserving pan or a wide nonreactive kettle.
